ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF with both ORIGINAL (page 1) and COPY (page 2) versions of the same certificate. Pages 3-4 contain an embedded invoice copy within the certificate file.

invoice.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF, 2 pages. Invoice No. C60034062-02 issued by CellMark AB.

document_pairing.method: Certificate file (Document A, pages 1-2) paired with separate invoice file (Document B, pages 1-2). Pages 3-4 of Document A are embedded invoice copies per rule 8.5.0 and are NOT used for verification.
document_pairing.pairing_rationale: Certificate references order C60034062 which matches invoice order number. Certificate consignor Cellmark AB matches invoice issuer CellMark AB. Buyer/consignee match. Invoice file (Document B) is the separate verification document per rule 8.5.0.

criteria_met: Consignor 'Cellmark AB' identified as invoice issuer 'CellMark AB' in invoice header/footer
Consignee 'EXPRESS PACK PRINT FZE' matches invoice buyer

lc_check.lc_verification_reasoning: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The certificate number SEG-26D-465562 and order reference C60034062 do not contain LC-related banking terms.

search_results.context: Footer block: 'CellMark AB / Lilla Bommen 3C·Box 11927 / SE-404 39 Gothenburg·Sweden'

search_results.location: Document B, page 1, header logo area
search_results.context: Company logo/brand name at top of invoice page
Footer block: 'CellMark AB / Lilla Bommen 3C·Box 11927 / SE-404 39 Gothenburg·Sweden'
'WE CERTIFY THAT THIS INVOICE IS TRUE AND CORRECT AND THAT THE GOODS ARE OF AUSTRIA ORIGIN / CellMark AB'

consignor_search.conclusion: Consignor name 'Cellmark AB' found in invoice as 'CellMark AB' in multiple locations (header branding, footer, certification text). Case variation only — same juridical party.

checkpoints.certificate_value: Cellmark AB, Box 11927, SE404 39, GÖTEBORG, Sweden
checkpoints.invoice_value: CellMark AB, Lilla Bommen 3C·Box 11927, SE-404 39 Gothenburg·Sweden

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name 'Cellmark AB' anywhere in invoice file
comparison_steps.result: MATCH – 'CellMark AB' found in invoice header branding, footer on pages 1 and 2, and certification text on page 2. Case variation 'Cellmark' vs 'CellMark' is normalized per section 4 (case normalization).
MATCH – Invoice footer states 'SE-404 39 Gothenburg·Sweden' and VAT No 'SE556244243301' (SE prefix confirms Sweden).

rules_applied.rule_description: Koncernstruktur – consignor name found expressly in invoice
Land verification via indirect identifiers (address and VAT prefix)

checkpoints.motivation: Certificate consignor 'Cellmark AB' is identified in the invoice as 'CellMark AB' in multiple locations: header branding, footer, and certification text. The case difference (Cellmark vs CellMark) is normalized per section 4. Country Sweden is confirmed by the invoice footer address ('Gothenburg·Sweden') and VAT prefix 'SE'. All conditions for MATCH are met.
checkpoints.debug_explanation: Cert text: 'Cellmark AB / Box 11927 / SE404 39, GÖTEBORG / Sweden'. Invoice text: 'CellMark AB / Lilla Bommen 3C·Box 11927 / SE-404 39 Gothenburg·Sweden'. Company name matches after case normalization. Country matches (Sweden). Rule 4.1.0 applies — consignor name found expressly in invoice. No need to proceed to 4.1.3.1–4.1.3.6.

evidence.raw_text: CellMark AB / Lilla Bommen 3C·Box 11927 / SE-404 39 Gothenburg·Sweden
evidence.relevance: Invoice issuer name and address matching consignor

checkpoints.invoice_value: EXPRESS PACK PRINT FZE, JEBEL ALI FREE ZONE, P.O. BOX 16797 ,PLOT NO EWTA - 28, DUBAI, UNITED ARAB EMIRATES

comparison_steps.description: Identify consignee in invoice's primary billing field
comparison_steps.result: MATCH – Invoice 'Buyer' field contains 'EXPRESS PACK PRINT FZE' with address in Dubai, United Arab Emirates. Exact match after whitespace normalization.
MATCH – Both documents state 'UNITED ARAB EMIRATES'.

rules_applied.rule_description: Priority order for consignee identification – Buyer field is primary

checkpoints.motivation: Certificate consignee 'EXPRESS PACK PRINT FZE' is found in the invoice's Buyer field with identical company name, address (JEBEL ALI FREE ZONE, P.O. BOX 16797, PLOT NO EWTA - 28, DUBAI) and country (UNITED ARAB EMIRATES). Perfect match.

Invoice Buyer field: 'EXPRESS PACK PRINT FZE / JEBEL ALI FREE ZONE / P.O. BOX 16797 ,PLOT NO EWTA - 28 / DUBAI / UNITED ARAB EMIRATES'. Exact match after whitespace/comma normalization. Country identical.

checkpoints.certificate_value: BROWN KRAFTLINER FSC CONTROLLED WOOD CERTIFICATE NO DNV-CW-001902 HS CODE: 480411
checkpoints.invoice_value: BROWN KRAFTLINER FSC CONTROLLED WOOD CERTIFICATE NO DNV-CW-001902 HS Code: 480411

comparison_steps.description: Check if certificate contains article numbers
comparison_steps.result: No dedicated article numbers in certificate (C60034062 is an order reference, not an article number). Proceed to Priority 2.

comparison_steps.description: Identify the identity-bearing main designation in the certificate and match against invoice
comparison_steps.result: MATCH – The identity-bearing main designation is 'BROWN KRAFTLINER'. This is found identically in the invoice description. Additionally, the full description 'BROWN KRAFTLINER FSC CONTROLLED WOOD CERTIFICATE NO DNV-CW-001902 HS Code: 480411' matches exactly between certificate and invoice after case normalization.

rules_applied.rule_description: Controlled text matching – identity-bearing main designation identified and matched
Non-identity-bearing additions – invoice contains additional width/GSM/core specifications per line which do not alter product identity

checkpoints.motivation: Certificate goods description 'BROWN KRAFTLINER FSC CONTROLLED WOOD CERTIFICATE NO DNV-CW-001902 HS CODE: 480411' matches the invoice's main description header exactly after case normalization. The invoice contains additional per-line specifications (GSM, width, core) which are non-identity-bearing additions per rule 4.3.4 and do not affect the match.
checkpoints.debug_explanation: Cert text: 'BROWN KRAFTLINER FSC CONTROLLED WOOD CERTIFICATE NO DNV-CW-001902 HS CODE: 480411'. Invoice text: 'BROWN KRAFTLINER FSC CONTROLLED WOOD CERTIFICATE NO DNV-CW-001902 HS Code: 480411'. Exact match after case normalization of 'CODE' vs 'Code'. Identity-bearing main designation 'BROWN KRAFTLINER' found identically in both. HS code 480411 matches. FSC certificate reference DNV-CW-001902 matches.

evidence.raw_text:
BROWN KRAFTLINER
FSC CONTROLLED WOOD CERTIFICATE NO DNV-CW-001902
HS CODE: 480411

BROWN KRAFTLINER FSC CONTROLLED WOOD CERTIFICATE NO
DNV-CW-001902 HS Code: 480411

comparison_steps.description: Certificate box 7 contains two quantities: 'GROSS/NETTO 160,987 MT' and '59 REELS'. Per rule 4.4.2.1, box 7 is the verification-grounding source.
comparison_steps.result: Both values identified in box 7. Primary verification value is '160,987 MT' (weight) per 4.4.2.1 critical rule. Secondary: '59 REELS'.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate states '160,987 MT'. This uses comma as thousands separator (European format). The value is 160987 MT = 160.987 MT in dot-decimal notation. Invoice states '160.987 MT' using dot as decimal separator. Need to determine: is cert value 160,987 (i.e., 160987) or 160.987? Given context: invoice total is 160.987 MT, individual line weights sum to approximately 160.987 MT. The comma in '160,987' in the certificate is a thousands separator making it 160987 MT — BUT this would be ~161,000 MT which is implausible for 59 reels of kraftliner. Actually, examining more carefully: the certificate notation '160,987 MT' with comma likely represents 160.987 MT (comma as decimal separator, European convention). The invoice confirms '160.987 MT'. These are the same value.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH – Certificate '160,987 MT' (comma as decimal separator, European convention) equals invoice '160.987 MT' (dot as decimal separator). Same numeric value: 160.987 metric tons.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate states 'GROSS/NETTO' indicating combined gross/net weight. Invoice states 'Gross/Net Weight'. Same designation.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH – Both indicate Gross/Net Weight. Per rule 4.4.2.2 point 2: single weight value with category, value matches invoice.
MATCH – Invoice Totals row states '59 REELS'. Exact match.

rules_applied.rule_description: Box 7 is the verification-grounding quantity source
rules_applied.outcome: Applied – both weight and reels from box 7

rules_applied.rule_description: Numeric value identification – decimal separator normalization (comma vs dot)
Weight category verification – GROSS/NETTO matches Gross/Net Weight
Multiple quantities – at least one verified (both verified here)

checkpoints.motivation: Certificate box 7 states 'GROSS/NETTO 160,987 MT' and '59 REELS'. The invoice totals row states 'Gross/Net Weight: 160.987 MT' and '59 REELS'. The certificate uses comma as decimal separator (European convention) while the invoice uses dot — same numeric value 160.987 MT. Weight category 'GROSS/NETTO' matches 'Gross/Net Weight'. Reels count 59 matches exactly. Both quantities verified successfully.
checkpoints.debug_explanation: Cert box 7: 'GROSS/NETTO 160,987 MT 59 REELS'. Invoice totals: '59 REELS Gross/Net Weight: 160.987 MT'. Numeric comparison: 160.987 = 160.987 (after decimal separator normalization). Reels: 59 = 59. Unit: MT = MT. Category: GROSS/NETTO = Gross/Net Weight. All match.

evidence.relevance: Context confirming this is the final totals row

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Certificate '160,987' means 160987 MT (comma as thousands separator)
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: 160987 MT (~161,000 metric tons) is implausible for 59 reels of kraftliner. The invoice confirms 160.987 MT. The comma is clearly a decimal separator in European notation.

checkpoints.invoice_value: MADE IN AUSTRIA / GOODS ARE OF AUSTRIA ORIGIN

comparison_steps.description: Search for explicit origin designation in invoice
comparison_steps.result: MATCH – Invoice page 2 contains 'MADE IN AUSTRIA' in shipping marks and 'THE GOODS ARE OF AUSTRIA ORIGIN' in certification text. Both explicitly state Austria as origin.

rules_applied.rule_description: Origin identification in invoice via 'Made in' and origin certification text

checkpoints.motivation: Certificate box 3 states 'AUSTRIA' as country of origin. The invoice explicitly states 'MADE IN AUSTRIA' in the shipping marks section and 'THE GOODS ARE OF AUSTRIA ORIGIN' in the certification text. Exact match — no normalization required.
checkpoints.debug_explanation: Cert box 3: 'AUSTRIA'. Invoice page 2: 'MADE IN AUSTRIA' (shipping marks) and 'WE CERTIFY THAT THIS INVOICE IS TRUE AND CORRECT AND THAT THE GOODS ARE OF AUSTRIA ORIGIN' (certification). Direct, unambiguous match.

evidence.raw_text: WE CERTIFY THAT THIS INVOICE IS TRUE AND CORRECT AND THAT THE GOODS ARE OF AUSTRIA ORIGIN

rule_evaluation_log.detail: No Letter of Credit reference found in certificate.

Certificate from Document A (pages 1-2, using ORIGINAL on page 1). Invoice from Document B (pages 1-2). Pages 3-4 of Document A are embedded invoice copies and not used for verification per rule 8.5.0.
Criteria met: consignor 'Cellmark AB' identified as 'CellMark AB' in invoice; consignee 'EXPRESS PACK PRINT FZE' matches invoice buyer; order reference C60034062 matches.
Consignor 'Cellmark AB' found as 'CellMark AB' in invoice header, footer, and certification text. Case normalization applied.
Sweden confirmed via invoice footer address and VAT prefix 'SE'.
Invoice Buyer field contains 'EXPRESS PACK PRINT FZE' matching certificate consignee exactly.

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Controlled text matching for goods description
rule_evaluation_log.detail: Identity-bearing main designation 'BROWN KRAFTLINER' and full description including HS code and FSC certificate number matched exactly.
Both weight (160.987 MT) and reels (59) from box 7 used as verification base.
160.987 MT and 59 REELS both found in invoice totals row.
'AUSTRIA' found in invoice as 'MADE IN AUSTRIA' and in origin certification text.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter överensstämmer mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Avsändaren Cellmark AB, mottagaren Express Pack Print FZE, varubeskrivningen Brown Kraftliner, kvantiteten 160,987 MT / 59 rullar samt ursprungslandet Österrike kan samtliga verifieras mot fakturan. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.
overall_assessment.summary_of_findings: All five checkpoints verified as MATCH. Consignor Cellmark AB identified in invoice as CellMark AB (case normalization). Consignee EXPRESS PACK PRINT FZE matches invoice buyer exactly. Goods description BROWN KRAFTLINER with HS code 480411 matches. Quantity 160.987 MT and 59 REELS both verified against invoice totals. Origin AUSTRIA confirmed by 'MADE IN AUSTRIA' and origin certification in invoice.
non_blocking_notes: Certificate file contains both ORIGINAL and COPY versions of the same certificate (pages 1-2). ORIGINAL used for verification.
Certificate file also contains embedded invoice copy (pages 3-4) which was not used for verification per rule 8.5.0.
Certificate uses comma as decimal separator (160,987) while invoice uses dot (160.987) — same value, different notation.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura

sections.certificate_value: Cellmark AB, Box 11927, SE404 39, GÖTEBORG, Sweden
sections.invoice_value: CellMark AB, Lilla Bommen 3C·Box 11927, SE-404 39 Gothenburg·Sweden
sections.rule_applied: Koncernstruktur (4.1.0) – consignor namn 'Cellmark AB' identifierat i fakturan som 'CellMark AB' i sidhuvud, sidfot och certifieringstext. Landverifiering via adress och VAT-prefix SE.
sections.motivation: Företagsnamnet Cellmark AB återfinns i fakturan som CellMark AB (versal/gemen-skillnad normaliserad). Landet Sverige bekräftas via fakturans adressblock och VAT-nummer med SE-prefix.

sections.certificate_value: EXPRESS PACK PRINT FZE, JEBEL ALI FREE ZONE, P.O. BOX 16797, PLOT NO EWTA - 28, DUBAI, UNITED ARAB EMIRATES
sections.invoice_value: EXPRESS PACK PRINT FZE, JEBEL ALI FREE ZONE, P.O. BOX 16797 ,PLOT NO EWTA - 28, DUBAI, UNITED ARAB EMIRATES
sections.rule_applied: Primärt faktureringsfält (4.2.0.2) – Buyer-fält i fakturan matchar certifikatets consignee exakt.
sections.motivation: EXPRESS PACK PRINT FZE med fullständig adress i Dubai, Förenade Arabemiraten identifieras i fakturans Buyer-fält med exakt överensstämmelse för företagsnamn, adress och land.

sections.certificate_value: BROWN KRAFTLINER FSC CONTROLLED WOOD CERTIFICATE NO DNV-CW-001902 HS CODE: 480411
sections.invoice_value: BROWN KRAFTLINER FSC CONTROLLED WOOD CERTIFICATE NO DNV-CW-001902 HS Code: 480411
sections.rule_applied: Kontrollerad textmatchning (4.3.3) – identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning 'BROWN KRAFTLINER' med HS-kod och FSC-referens identifierad exakt i fakturan.
sections.motivation: Den identitetsbärande huvudbeteckningen 'BROWN KRAFTLINER' samt FSC-certifikatnummer DNV-CW-001902 och HS-kod 480411 överensstämmer exakt mellan certifikat och faktura. Fakturans ytterligare radspecifikationer (GSM, bredd, kärna) är icke-identitetsbärande tillägg.

sections.rule_applied: Förekomstkontroll (4.4.3) med decimalteckennormalisering – certifikatets 160,987 MT (komma som decimaltecken) överensstämmer med fakturans 160.987 MT (punkt som decimaltecken). 59 REELS matchar exakt.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets vikt 160,987 MT (GROSS/NETTO) identifieras i fakturans totalsumma som 160.987 MT (Gross/Net Weight). Komma vs punkt avser samma decimaltecken i olika konventioner — samma numeriska värde. Antal rullar 59 REELS matchar exakt.

sections.invoice_value: MADE IN AUSTRIA / THE GOODS ARE OF AUSTRIA ORIGIN
sections.rule_applied: Ursprungsidentifiering (4.5.1) – 'AUSTRIA' uttryckligen angivet i fakturan via 'MADE IN AUSTRIA' och ursprungscertifiering.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets ursprungsland 'AUSTRIA' bekräftas uttryckligen i fakturan genom 'MADE IN AUSTRIA' i fraktmärkningar och 'THE GOODS ARE OF AUSTRIA ORIGIN' i certifieringstext. Exakt överensstämmelse.

output_quality_checks.notes: All 5 checkpoints MATCH with confidence >= 0.97. comparison_result IDENTICAL is consistent. workflow_recommendation AUTO_APPROVAL_ELIGIBLE is consistent with IDENTICAL result. No confidence values below 0.85 threshold.
